Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. From birds to brains: My path to the fusiform face area (2024) 32 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. A tail-call interpreter in (nightly) Rust 109 upvotes, 13 comments
  3. Tracing Goroutines in Realtime with eBPF 56 upvotes, 6 comments
  4. Musician says AI company is cloning her music, filing claims against her 31 upvotes, 2 comments
  5. Computational Physics (2nd Edition) 76 upvotes, 10 comments
  6. Nanocode: The best Claude Code that $200 can buy in pure JAX on TPUs 125 upvotes, 22 comments
  7. Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022) 104 upvotes, 22 comments
  8. Perfmon – Consolidate your favorite CLI monitoring tools into a single TUI 39 upvotes, 6 comments
  9. Gemma 4 on iPhone 257 upvotes, 72 comments
  10. Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI 518 upvotes, 163 comments
  11. Running Gemma 4 locally with LM Studio's new headless CLI and Claude Code 118 upvotes, 30 comments
  12. LÖVE: 2D Game Framework for Lua 123 upvotes, 41 comments
  13. Music for Programming 47 upvotes, 13 comments
  14. Show HN: Contrapunk – Real-time counterpoint harmony from guitar input 108 upvotes, 40 comments
  15. Caveman: Why use many token when few token do trick 636 upvotes, 298 comments
  16. Friendica – A Decentralized Social Network 113 upvotes, 43 comments
  17. Baby's Second Garbage Collector 38 upvotes, 11 comments
  18. Lisette a little language inspired by Rust that compiles to Go 244 upvotes, 128 comments
  19. The threat is comfortable drift toward not understanding what you're doing 771 upvotes, 509 comments
  20. LibreOffice – Let's put an end to the speculation 132 upvotes, 76 comments
  21. Bacteria found in the human intestine capable of improving muscle strength 102 upvotes, 59 comments
  22. Finnish sauna heat exposure induces stronger immune cell than cytokine responses 293 upvotes, 196 comments
  23. UK intelligence censored report on global warming and homeland security 48 upvotes, 24 comments
  24. Just 'English with Hanzi' 72 upvotes, 40 comments
  25. Artemis II crew see first glimpse of far side of Moon [video] 357 upvotes, 279 comments
  26. The Mechanics of Steins Gate (2023) [pdf] 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. The Free Market Lie: Why Switzerland Has 25 Gbit Internet and America Doesn't 77 upvotes, 55 comments
  28. Qwen-3.6-Plus is the first model to break 1T tokens processed in a day 15 upvotes, 10 comments
  29. The underrated benefits of always having oatmeal at lunch 30 upvotes, 36 comments
  30. Hightouch (YC S19) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments
